headline: Is Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) A Top Growth Stock in Billionaire Philippe Laffont’s Portfolio?
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the top growth stocks in billionaire Philippe Laffont’s portfolio. On April 4, analysts at Barclays reiterated Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) with an Overweight and raised the price target to $360 from $356. The price target hike comes on the heels of Constellation Energy reiterating that it expects its […]
